HuggingFaceTB/SmolLM2-135M-Instruct.name: SmolLM2 135M
HuggingFaceTB/SmolLM2-135M-Instruct.notes: Tiny model, fast training. Good for experimentation.

Qwen/Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct.name: Qwen 2.5 0.5B
Qwen/Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct.notes: Small but capable. Good balance of quality and speed.

Qwen/Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct.name: Qwen 2.5 1.5B
Qwen/Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct.notes: Larger model, better quality. Needs more VRAM (~4GB).

Qwen/Qwen3.5-0.8B.name: Qwen 3.5 0.8B
Qwen/Qwen3.5-0.8B.notes: Qwen3.5 series. Currently running on Orange Pi via llama-server (GGUF Q4_K_M).

HuggingFaceTB/SmolLM2-360M-Instruct.name: SmolLM2 360M
HuggingFaceTB/SmolLM2-360M-Instruct.notes: Medium SmolLM2 variant. Still fast to train.
